data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Steady, Dogecoin Falls Even As Trump's Tariff Reprieve Boosts Stocks: Analyst Says $82,024 BTC Level 'Worth Watching Closely'
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies remained flat on Monday, while stocks rose in response to President Donald Trump’s tariff respite for technology products.

data.title: Chainlink Down 60% From December Highs, Retesting November Lows: Potential Higher Timeframe Structure Shift Developing
Amazon Founder Jeff Bezos Once Made His Grandmother Cry Trying To Show Off His Math Skills — That Day, His Grandfather Gave Him A Life-Changing Piece Of Wisdom
data.description: Jeff Bezos recalls a childhood moment when his math skills made his grandmother cry—leading to a life-changing lesson from his grandfather: "It's harder to be kind than clever."

data.title: Trump Administration Halts $2.2 Billion In Harvard Grants After University Says Don't Dictate What We Can Teach Or Who We Admit
data.description: The Trump administration suspended $2.2 billion in grants to Harvard after the university refused to eliminate DEI programs and screen international students for ideological views, putting nearly $9 billion in federal funding at risk.
